name: Survive Now
short_description: In this thrilling top-down roguelite survival game, you'll face off against hordes of creatures in a desperate battle for survival. You'll need to collect energy to unlock new skills and upgrade existing ones, and every moment counts as you fight your way through waves of monsters.
detailed_description:
Survive Now is a top-down stylized survival game with roguelite elements. Each level lasts for 40 minutes, and while surviving until the end may seem easy, but no one can complete any level in a single try

  • Supports mouse, keyboard
  • controller support will come in the next update

Features & Quick tips

  • Dozens of skill available to learn and upgrade
  • Collect energy to learn new skills and upgrade exising skills
  • Maximum 7 weapon skill you can use at once
